title: The most insane week in AI
summary: A YouTube video surveying major AI releases and research from a single week, including new model versions from Deepseek, Tencent, Xiaomi, Alibaba Qwen, and OpenAI, plus robotics advances and generative tools. The channel highlights tools like GPT-5.5, Deepseek V4, Kimi K2.6, MiMo v2.5, and various open research projects across vision, game engines, mesh generation, and image editing.
